title: traxik's Mini tools
description: A texture pack that reduces tools sizes for a cleaner look and more visibility during gameplay, especially in PvP.
body:
## Check out my other resource packs!
[![Mini Swords](https://i.postimg.cc/NMj4XkGC/mini-swords-przycisk-50.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mini-swords)
## Pack content
This pack changes textures of tools (Pickaxe, axe, shovel & hoe) to make them smaller and cleaner in order to get better visibility in gameplay, especially in PvP. Check out my mini swords pack to get same effect but with swords.

![Changed textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1fecb247081f6f5a13fcbc77ca1415bfbbeae9f.png)
